positive: A stylized, minimalist vector illustration of a celestial fox and crescent moon. The fox has flowing, stylized tails and glowing, nebula-filled fur, set against a deep indigo and sapphire blue night sky. The composition features strong contrast using geometric shapes and clean lines, creating a powerful silhouette effect. Incorporate subtle bioluminescent accents (glowing blues, purples, and teal) that define the shapes. The style should be modern, highly graphic, and suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Central composition, centered within a perfect circle for easy placement.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, noise, bad anatomy, deformed, asymmetrical, realistic photo, photorealism, gradient fill, messy, complex background, logos, trademarks
